idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for car repair searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'car repair' keyword

behavior: A spike in car repair searches suggests rising consumer stress related to unexpected expenses impacting discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending may get squeezed when repair-related stress increases.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY when weekly car repair search interest rises over 20% compared to previous 3-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when interest drops below 10% increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends weekly keyword interest often shows multiple 20%+ spikes yearly.

idea: Labor job posting drop with rising unemployment claims

data.source: FRED weekly unemployment claims and job postings data

behavior: A simultaneous drop in job postings and rise in unemployment claims signals labor demand weakening rapidly.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector sensitive to labor market stress and potential credit risks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF when job postings drop 5% WoW and unemployment claims rise 3% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if either metric reverses by 2%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly labor data commonly shows small but meaningful opposite moves during slowdowns.

idea: Freight logistics sudden volume spike vs. railcar load decline

data.source: Port container volume weekly data and freight railcar load weekly data from public APIs

behavior: A sudden rise in port container volume combined with falling railcar loads implies modal shift and supply chain stress.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector exposed to freight disruption and logistic cost inflation.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when port container volume rises >10% WoW and railcar load drops >5% WoW simultaneously
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when either metric normalizes within 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly freight data regularly shows these cross-modal divergences during supply chain disruptions.

idea: Consumer stress spike via sudden gasoline price acceleration
behavior: Rapid gasoline price increases quickly raise consumer stress and reduce discretionary spending ability.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer staples may see margin pressure as consumers trade down or cut other expenses.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLP when weekly gasoline prices rise >4% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or price growth slows below 1% WoW

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Gas price weekly spikes >4% occur multiple times annually in volatile energy markets.

idea: Political insider selling spike in financial sector ETF

data.source: Public political insider filings aggregated weekly

behavior: Surge in insider selling by political figures signals sector-specific risk perception or regulatory fears.

market_impact.rationale: Political insiders often have early knowledge on regulatory or economic risks impacting finance.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF when insider selling volume spikes more than 30% WoW above 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when selling volume normalizes below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly insider filings often have clustered selling before major news or market rotations.

idea: Google Trends spike in 'DIY home repair' searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'DIY home repair' keyword

behavior: Increased interest in DIY home repair indicates consumers delaying professional services, signaling local economic stress.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector containing home improvement and construction exposure may slow with reduced service demand.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when weekly DIY home repair searches increase by 25% over prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when search growth falls below 10%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: DIY search interest frequently spikes seasonally and during economic slowdowns.

idea: Weekly spike in RSS count for inflation-related news

data.source: RSS feed aggregation counts for 'inflation' keyword weekly

behavior: Sudden increase in inflation-related news volume tends to raise market anxiety and pressure cyclicals.

market_impact.rationale: Materials sector is sensitive to inflation pressures and input cost volatility.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLB when weekly inflation-related RSS count rises 40% above 8-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when count drops below 20% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Inflation news cycles spike multiple times per year, especially around Fed announcements.

idea: Weekly acceleration in Google Trends for 'flight delay' searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'flight delay' keyword

behavior: Rising flight delay searches signal travel disruptions that may pressure airline and travel-related stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary travel exposure suffers from mobility disruptions and consumer frustration.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY when weekly flight delay search interest rises >15% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when search interest declines below 5% WoW

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Flight delay searches spike regularly around holiday seasons and weather events.

idea: Weekly unusual jump in EV charger new installations

data.source: OpenChargeMap daily EV charger installation counts aggregated weekly

behavior: Sudden rapid increases in EV charger installations reflect accelerated local EV adoption trends impacting energy and tech sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Communication and tech sectors benefit from increased EV infrastructure adoption and related innovation.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLC when weekly new charger installations increase >30% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when growth slows below 10%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charger install rates have multiple bursts aligned with policy announcements or incentives.

idea: Weekly surge in FRED series for producer price index momentum

data.source: FRED weekly producer price index (PPI) change data

behavior: Acceleration in PPI signals rising input costs that can pressure corporate margins, especially in industrials.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial companies face margin compression from rising input prices.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when weekly PPI increase exceeds 0.5% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when PPI growth falls below 0.1% WoW

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI changes regularly exceed 0.5% WoW during commodity price volatility.

idea: Unexpected weekly drop in freight railcar load factor

data.source: Public freight railcar load weekly data

behavior: A steep drop in railcar load factor signals weakening industrial demand and potential economic slowdown.

market_impact.rationale: Lower freight rail usage correlates to reduced industrial output and economic activity.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when weekly railcar load factor drops more than 7% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when load factor recovers by 3%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Railcar load fluctuations of this magnitude occur several times annually tied to economic cycles.

idea: Weekly spike in Google Trends for 'energy price hike' searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'energy price hike' keyword

behavior: Rising consumer search interest in energy price hikes signals growing concern about inflationary pressures.

market_impact.rationale: Energy sector may face volatility and sell-offs amid fear of demand destruction or regulation.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLE when weekly search interest rises >20% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when interest falls below 5% WoW

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Energy price concern search spikes commonly happen around volatility in crude prices.

idea: Weekly unusual jump in earthquake activity in industrial hubs

data.source: USGS weekly earthquake count near key industrial areas

behavior: Unexpected increase in earthquake activity near industrial hubs may disrupt supply chains and production.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector vulnerable to physical disruptions in key manufacturing regions.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI when weekly earthquake count near hubs exceeds 3x prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when activity returns to normal

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity clusters occur episodically, causing supply chain jitters.

idea: Weekly spike in Google Trends for 'gig economy job' searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly data for 'gig economy job' keyword

behavior: Increased interest in gig economy jobs suggests labor market softness and shifting employment preferences.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending may weaken due to labor income uncertainty.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLY when weekly gig economy job search interest rises >30% WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or when interest falls below 15% WoW

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Gig job search interest fluctuates with economic cycles and labor market uncertainty.

idea: Weekly surge in RSS count for corporate layoffs announcements

data.source: RSS feed counts for 'layoffs' keyword aggregated weekly

behavior: Spike in corporate layoff news volume signals worsening labor conditions and reduced consumer confidence.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector sensitive to economic downturns and credit risk from labor market stress.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF when weekly layoff-related RSS count rises >50% above 8-week average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or when count drops below 20% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Layoff news clusters occur frequently, especially in cyclical downturns.
